description:
An Open Source multitrack tablature editor and player written in Java.


* Allow continuous scrolling when playing
* Add anticipation to discrete scrolling when playing
* Security fix for CVE-2026-55543: Prevent embedding or loading malicious Java
  classes in a TG file
* Allow tempo changes on selection
* Save and restore zoom level across sessions
* Add option to insert chord diagram without notes
* Add plausibility checks to the "Play Mode" dialog
* Add quantization to MIDI import
* Add option to remove CC/PC events from Midi export
* Improve support for DLS soundbanks
* Improve documentation of the sound settings
* Detect dark mode on startup (macOS, Linux/KDE)
* Add search by key binding in Key Binding Editor
* Add "Discard All" option when closing with multiple unsaved documents
* Support XDG_CONFIG_HOME and XDG_CACHE_HOME on Linux and FreeBSD
* Enable TuxGuitar Synthesizer LV2 extension plugin on FreeBSD
* Android: Keep screen on during playback
* Android: Add player controls
* More small improvements and cleanups
